channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists show potential in reducing substance use disorders
item.description: 1. Glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonists are associated with a lower risk of developing new substance use disorders. 2. These medications ...

item.title: Signs of Kidney Stones You Shouldn’t Ignore
Polyethylene glycol-mediated nerve repair may accelerate early recovery in patients with distal forearm nerve injuries
item.description: 1. Polyethylene glycol-mediated neurorrhaphy was associated with early sensory recovery and lower pain scores in the early postoperative period compar...

item.title: Maternal use of benzodiazepines and non-benzodiazepine hypnotics is not associated with increased risk of psychiatric
item.description: 1. Maternal use of benzodiazepines or non-benzodiazepine hypnotics (Z-hypnotics) during pregnancy was not associated with an increased risk of psychia...
